mapper.insert: insert into work_order_auto_close_config(config_key, status, days_after, action, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{configKey}, #{status}, #{daysAfter}, #{action}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_auto_close_config set config_key = #{configKey}, status = #{status}, days_after = #{daysAfter}, action = #{action}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, config_key, status, days_after, action, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_auto_close_config where id = #{id}
select id, config_key, status, days_after, action, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_auto_close_config where status = #{status} and enabled = 1 limit 1
select id, config_key, status, days_after, action, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_auto_close_config order by id asc
select id, config_key, status, days_after, action, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_auto_close_config where enabled = 1 order by id asc
